Re: UI/UX Designer Opportunity

Hi Oksana,

Thank you for reaching out. I hope you’re well too.

I would be available for a quick call on Monday at 11:30 AM (SAST). Please let me know if that works for you.

I’ve also reviewed the job specification and look forward to discussing the opportunity further.

Best regards,
Ababalwe Jali

You said:

Polish this message and provide in a form of ready to copy: The current Pricing section feels visually outdated and too basic for a modern SaaS product. I would like it to be fully redesigned into a premium, modern SaaS-style pricing experience with a clean, intelligent, and highly engaging UI. The redesign should target three user segments: Individuals Teams Enterprise Design Requirements The section should have a dark/black background Pricing cards should use a glassmorphism design. The cards not to be plain glass to have a bit of a thickness. Include a billing toggle that is fully functional switch between the Monthly / Annual (Save 20%) using a glass-style UI Smooth entry animation when the section comes into view (triggered at ~40% scroll visibility) The entire section should feel premium, modern, and interactive What I would like you to explain Please briefly brainstorm and outline: How you would approach the redesign of this Pricing section The visual direction and UI inspiration references you would use The layout structure, interaction design, and animations you would introduce How you would make the section feel more: Interactive Trustworthy Data-driven Goal The goal is to create a Pricing section that feels modern, intelligent, and aligned with current SaaS and AI product design standards. It should reflect a high-end product experience, similar to what users expect from leading AI and SaaS platforms today. Why this matters The design direction should align with modern frontend expectations by: Reducing visual noise while increasing perceived value Improving interaction feedback through motion and micro-interactions Enhancing decision-making clarity for users choosing between plans
3/3

ChatGPT said:

Here is a polished, clean, and ready-to-copy version:

The current Pricing section feels visually outdated and overly simplistic for a modern SaaS product. I would like it to be completely redesigned into a premium, modern SaaS-style pricing experience with a clean, intelligent, and highly engaging user interface.

The redesign should clearly serve three user segments:

  • Individuals

  • Teams

  • Enterprise

Design Requirements

  • The section must use a dark/black background for a premium feel

  • Pricing cards should use a refined glassmorphism style (not flat glass — the cards should have subtle depth, thickness, and layered dimensionality)

  • Include a fully functional billing toggle that switches between Monthly and Annual pricing (Annual should indicate “Save 20%”) using a glass-style UI component

  • Add smooth entry animations when the section comes into view (triggered at approximately 40% scroll visibility)

  • The entire section should feel premium, modern, and highly interactive

What I would like you to include

Please briefly brainstorm and outline:

  • Your approach to redesigning this Pricing section

  • The visual direction and UI inspiration you would draw from

  • The proposed layout structure, interaction design, and animation strategy

  • How you would improve the perception of the section in terms of:

    • Interactivity

    • Trustworthiness

    • Data-driven clarity

Goal

The objective is to design a Pricing section that feels modern, intelligent, and aligned with current SaaS and AI product design standards.

It should reflect a high-end product experience comparable to leading AI and SaaS platforms.

Why this matters

The design direction should align with modern frontend expectations by:

  • Reducing visual noise while increasing perceived value

  • Improving interaction feedback through motion and micro-interactions

  • Enhancing decision-making clarity for users selecting between plans


You said:

Polish this message so that the front-End developer understands what is expected of him. Yesterday evening, I got a call from the client of DataOps informing me that he wants to contribute to the design of the project by adding his favorite welcoming section which the section is the hero section of the landing page. He explained the section crystal clear as a clean and intuitive section that have interactions and amination. This section is a welcoming section to the first time users and members of the platform. He wants the section to have a white background and The section is having two sides the left side will be tagline, headline, sub-headlines, Two CTAs and a closing that says "No credit card required. Get started in seconds and see how DataOps can transform your data workflow". The right-side will have two laptops the second laptop will be at the back of the first laptop that will be at the front. As we all know people who are not designers, developers they they lose trust when a hero section or the website is poorly designed. As a Front-End Developer you are expected to design this intuitive hero section Tell me the design approach you will take in this section? Why you think this would be the best design approach? Which design trend you will use in this section.? Name down the inspirations with their links. and why you think they will meet the design style of DataOps? What you will do differently from the design style that is used by other live website. and why you think this is the best.
6/6

ChatGPT said:

Yesterday evening, I received a call from the DataOps client informing me that he would like to contribute to the overall design direction of the project by refining and elevating the Hero Section of the landing page.

The client explained the vision for the section very clearly. He wants the Hero Section to feel clean, intuitive, modern, and highly interactive, with smooth animations and engaging visual interactions. This section will serve as the primary welcoming experience for both first-time users and returning members of the platform.

The section should have a clean white background and follow a modern split-layout structure:

Left Side Content:

  • Tagline

  • Main headline

  • Supporting sub-headline

  • Two CTA buttons

  • Closing supporting text:
    “No credit card required. Get started in seconds and see how DataOps can transform your data workflow.”

Right Side Visual:

  • Two laptop mockups/screens

  • One laptop positioned in front while the second laptop sits slightly behind it to create depth and visual layering

  • The laptops should showcase the platform UI in a modern and visually compelling way

As we know, users — especially non-designers and non-technical audiences — quickly lose trust in a product when the Hero Section or website feels outdated, generic, or poorly designed. Because of this, the Hero Section must immediately communicate professionalism, trust, innovation, and product quality.

As the Front-End Developer, you are expected to design and develop this Hero Section to match modern SaaS and AI platform standards.

Please provide a brief breakdown covering the following:

  1. Design Approach

  • What design approach would you take for this Hero Section?

  • Why do you believe this is the best approach for DataOps?

  1. Design Direction & Trends

  • Which modern design trends would you implement in this section?

  • How would those trends improve the overall user experience and perceived product quality?

  1. Inspiration References
    Please provide inspiration references (with links) from modern SaaS, AI, or tech platforms that align with the vision for DataOps.

For each inspiration:

  • Explain what specifically inspires you

  • Explain why it aligns with the DataOps design direction

  1. Innovation & Differentiation

  • What would you do differently from the design styles commonly used on live SaaS websites today?

  • How would your approach make the Hero Section feel more unique, premium, and memorable?

The final outcome should feel modern, polished, trustworthy, interactive, and visually impressive while maintaining excellent usability and performance.


You said:

I want you to be a prompt Engineer I will tell you how this section I want will look like then you prompt it so it can be clear to a Front-End Developer.

ChatGPT said:

Perfect — that’s exactly the right way to structure it.

Send me your raw vision of the section (messy, detailed, even incomplete is fine). I’ll convert it into a clear, developer-ready prompt that a Front-End Developer can execute without confusion.

When you send it, try to include (if possible):

  • Layout idea (left/right, grid, centered, etc.)

  • Colors / mood

  • Animations or interactions

  • Components (buttons, cards, images, etc.)

  • Any references in your head

  • “Feel” (e.g. premium, playful, corporate, futuristic)

Send it through.


You said:

Provide with a prompt of a Sign in page. In the input group I don't expect to have label i expect to have <input placeholder="Enter your email"> and <input placeholder="Enter your password"> and checkbox for keep me logged in and forgot password link. This page is expected to be minimal. Inspired by framer. The placeholders, CTA buttons are not expected to be big. Text is expected to be 16px and everything must fit on the screen without the page having a horizontal scrolling. The page must have hero image at the right. filling the full height of the screen. The headline " Sign in" must have font size of 38px
2/2

ChatGPT said:

Design and develop a modern minimal Sign In page inspired by Framer’s clean and premium design style.

The overall experience should feel lightweight, elegant, polished, and highly focused on simplicity. The design should prioritize spacing, typography, smooth interactions, and subtle visual hierarchy rather than heavy UI elements.

Design Direction:

  • Minimal modern SaaS aesthetic

  • Inspired by Framer, Linear, and modern AI product interfaces

  • Clean layout with generous whitespace

  • Soft shadows and subtle borders

  • Smooth hover states and transitions

  • No visual clutter

  • Everything should feel balanced and refined

Layout Structure:
The page should use a two-column layout:

Left Side:

  • Contains the Sign In form and all authentication content

  • Vertically centered

  • Clean spacing between elements

  • Minimal and compact UI structure

Right Side:

  • Full-height hero image/visual

  • The image must fill the entire right side vertically without gaps

  • The visual should feel modern, premium, and tech-focused

  • The image should scale properly on large screens without distortion

Typography Requirements:

  • Main headline: “Sign in”

  • Font size for the headline must be exactly 38px

  • All body text, placeholders, checkbox labels, links, and supporting text should use 16px font size

  • Typography should feel clean, modern, and highly readable

  • Use a refined font hierarchy similar to Framer’s interface design

Form Requirements:
The form should NOT use traditional labels above inputs.

Instead, use clean placeholder-based inputs only:

<input placeholder="Enter your email"> <input placeholder="Enter your password">

Additional form elements:

  • “Keep me logged in” checkbox

  • “Forgot password?” link aligned neatly within the form row

  • Compact CTA button

  • Inputs and buttons should NOT feel oversized or bulky

  • Maintain a minimal height and balanced spacing

Interaction & UI Expectations:

  • Subtle hover effects on buttons and links

  • Smooth focus states on inputs

  • Elegant micro-interactions

  • Clean transitions with no aggressive animations

  • The page should feel premium and frictionless

Responsive Requirements:

  • The entire page must fit perfectly within the viewport

  • Absolutely NO horizontal scrolling

  • Layout must remain clean across desktop and laptop resolutions

  • Proper responsive behavior on smaller screens

  • Ensure spacing and scaling remain visually balanced

Important Design Notes:

  • Keep the UI highly minimal

  • Avoid excessive gradients, glowing effects, or heavy shadows

  • The design should feel production-ready and modern

  • Prioritize trust, clarity, and simplicity

  • The final result should resemble a premium SaaS authentication experience used by leading modern tech platforms

ChatGPT said:

Here’s a complete, structured MidJourney-ready prompt that extends your concept into a full magazine/book cover (front + spine + back cover) while keeping the same luxury editorial direction:

MidJourney Prompt:

Hyper-realistic editorial magazine cover design for a luxury collaboration between Avon and VOGUE, full book-style wraparound cover (front cover, spine, and back cover visible in a single composition). Square 1:1 composition, cinematic high-fashion photography style.

Set in a sleek Parisian luxury interior with polished marble floors, tall ornate windows, and soft golden afternoon sunlight pouring in, creating elegant natural highlights and deep cinematic shadows. The atmosphere feels premium, timeless, and editorial.

Front Cover (left/center focus):
A high-fashion couture model stands gracefully in an expressive yet elegant pose, wearing a flowing couture gown with intricate fabric detailing and soft movement. Beside her, placed on a refined marble pedestal, is a realistically detailed Avon perfume bottle with the Avon logo clearly visible and sharply in focus. The lighting emphasizes luxury, texture, and sophistication, inspired by Vogue editorial covers.

Spine (center transition):
Minimal luxury magazine spine design, elegant typography reading “VOGUE x AVON COLLECTION”, clean alignment, subtle embossed texture, refined and understated.

Back Cover (right side):
Continuation of the Parisian scene with softer focus. The model is partially turned away, creating visual continuity. A secondary composition shows Avon beauty products arranged artfully on marble surfaces (perfume, skincare bottles). Include editorial-style typography blocks, barcode placement, and minimal product description layout typical of luxury magazine back covers.

Ultra-detailed textures, cinematic realism, shallow depth of field, soft glow lighting, Vogue-inspired fashion photography, high-end beauty campaign aesthetic, luxury branding, clean composition, balanced negative space, 8K resolution, film-grade color grading, photorealistic finish.

--ar 1:1 --v 7 --stylize 250 --quality 2

You said:

I want you to be a prompt Engineer and Provide me with a prompt for a book cover of Markham. For the front Cover and the back cover. The book background color to use White. Overview of Markham (South Africa) Markham is one of the biggest men’s clothing stores in South Africa, known for affordable and trendy fashion for men. What Markham is about in simple explanation Markham is a men’s fashion store that sells clothes and accessories so men can dress: Smart (formal / office) Casual (everyday wear) Trendy (modern street fashion) It is found in most major malls across South Africa. What they sell Markham focuses only on men’s fashion, including: Clothing Shirts (formal and casual) Jeans and chinos Jackets and coats T-shirts and polos Suits (for weddings, interviews, work) Shoes Formal shoes Sneakers Smart-casual footwear Accessories Belts Wallets Watches Sunglasses Bags Target customers Markham mainly targets: Young men (about 18–35) Working professionals Students upgrading their wardrobe Men who want smart-casual or office looks Style of the brand Markham’s style is: Clean Modern Urban Smart-casual focused Slightly premium but still affordable Think of it as: “Looking sharp without being overly expensive luxury.” Where it fits in South African fashion More stylish and formal than cheap retail stores Less expensive than luxury brands Competes with stores like H&M, Mr Price, and Old Khaki (depending on category) Key strengths Wide availability in malls nationwide Good variety for workwear and smart outfits Strong denim and jacket collections Easy place to build a full outfit (head to toe) Simple summary Markham is basically: A South African men’s clothing brand where you can get everything from everyday outfits to formal suits in one store.
4/4

ChatGPT said:

Here is a clean, production-ready MidJourney / image-generation prompt for a Markham book-style magazine cover (front + back) with a white background and a strong retail fashion identity.

🎯 FULL PROMPT (Front + Spine + Back Cover)

Ultra-modern minimalist book cover design for a South African men’s fashion brand called “Markham”, presented as a full wraparound editorial book cover (front cover, spine, and back cover visible in one composition). Clean white background, premium retail fashion aesthetic, inspired by modern lookbooks, Zara editorial campaigns, and high-end mall fashion branding.

FRONT COVER (left / primary focus)

A stylish young modern South African man wearing smart-casual Markham-inspired clothing: fitted chinos, crisp white shirt, lightweight jacket, clean sneakers. He is standing confidently in a minimal studio environment with soft natural lighting and subtle shadow depth.

The look is clean, sharp, and urban. The model represents confidence, youth, and modern masculinity.

Typography on front cover:

  • “MARKHAM” large, bold, modern sans-serif type

  • Subtle tagline: “Smart. Casual. Confident.”

  • Minimal editorial spacing, luxury retail magazine style

No clutter. Strong breathing space. Premium simplicity.

SPINE (center)

Thin vertical spine design with:

  • “MARKHAM” vertically aligned

  • Minimal branding line elements

  • Clean, structured retail book aesthetic

  • Subtle grey accents on white background

BACK COVER (right side)

Minimal editorial layout featuring:

  • Secondary lifestyle imagery of men’s fashion items neatly arranged:

    • shirts, jeans, jackets, shoes, belts, watches, sunglasses, bags

  • Flat-lay or soft-shadow product arrangement

  • Clean grid-based composition

Typography blocks:

  • Short brand description:
    “Markham is a modern South African men’s fashion brand offering smart, casual, and trendy clothing for everyday confidence.”

  • Categories section:
    Smart Wear • Casual Wear • Street Style • Accessories • Footwear

  • Subtle barcode placement at bottom right

  • Minimal social/brand placeholder text

  • Clean editorial spacing, magazine back cover realism

DESIGN STYLE & MOOD

Ultra-clean white background, premium retail fashion branding, minimal Scandinavian-inspired layout, soft studio lighting, high-end commercial photography, Zara / Uniqlo / COS editorial influence, modern menswear aesthetic, balanced negative space, subtle shadows, professional product advertising quality.

No visual noise. No gradients. No clutter.

TECHNICAL STYLE

Photorealistic, 8K detail, editorial fashion photography, sharp focus, soft diffusion lighting, modern commercial composition, luxury retail magazine design system, high-end branding mockup.

If you want next level upgrades, I can also:

  • Turn this into a MidJourney V6 ultra-optimized prompt (short version)

  • Or design a matching inside pages (lookbook spread)

  • Or convert this into a Figma-ready design system prompt for a UI designer

You said:

One of our biggest clients, Takealot, has commissioned us to create a premium product advertisement for their latest Sony wireless headphones. As you know, maintaining our strong working relationship with Takealot is a top priority, so the quality of this deliverable needs to reflect agency-level execution. **Project Objective** Create a highly engaging, modern, and conversion-focused social media product advertisement that highlights the key benefits of the Sony headphones while remaining clean, premium, and visually compelling. **Design Direction** * Minimal and premium aesthetic * Modern eCommerce advertising style * Similar quality to leading technology brands such as Sony, Apple, Bose, and JBL * Strong product focus with professional lighting and shadows * High visual hierarchy * Suitable for Instagram, Facebook, X (Twitter), and Takealot promotional campaigns * Clean background with subtle gradients and premium visual effects * Use Sony-inspired visual language and maintain a professional retail advertising standard **Product to Feature** Sony Wireless Over-Ear Headphones (Image will be provided separately) **Primary Headline Suggestions** * Experience Sound Without Distractions * Premium Sound. Ultimate Focus. * Hear Every Detail. * Next-Level Wireless Audio. * Silence the Noise. Enjoy the Music. **Key Features to Highlight** ✓ Adaptive Active Noise Cancelling ✓ Up to 55 Hours Playtime ✓ 40mm Dynamic Drivers ✓ Multipoint Device Connection ✓ Fast Charging (5 Minutes = 4 Hours Playback) ✓ Hi-Res Audio & LDAC Support **Target Audience** * Students * Professionals * Remote workers * Travellers * Music enthusiasts * Everyday consumers looking for premium audio quality **Product Benefits** * Reduces environmental noise during commuting * Supports long listening sessions * Seamlessly switches between devices * Comfortable for all-day wear * Ideal for work, travel, entertainment, and home use **Visual Requirements** * Product must be the hero element * Create depth using shadows, reflections, and subtle glow effects * Include premium feature icons where appropriate * Use concise copy with strong visual impact * Ensure mobile-first readability **Deliverables** * 1040 × 1040 Social Media Post * Editable source file * High-resolution PNG export The headphone product image will be provided separately. Please ensure the final design is polished, premium, and worthy of a featured Takealot campaign.

ChatGPT said:

The product image you've provided is already premium and suitable for a high-end retail campaign. For a designer or AI image-generation workflow, I would recommend the following creative direction and prompt:

Creative Concept

"Silence the World. Hear What Matters."

The headphones become the hero element, positioned centrally with a luxury technology aesthetic. The design should communicate focus, premium sound, and modern lifestyle.

AI Design Prompt

Create a premium eCommerce social media advertisement for Sony Wireless Over-Ear Headphones.

The Sony headphones are the hero element of the composition, displayed in a luxury product photography style. The headphones sit on a sophisticated dark gradient background transitioning from deep charcoal black to subtle midnight blue. Soft cinematic lighting creates elegant highlights around the earcups and headband, while realistic shadows and reflections add depth and realism.

Behind the headphones, incorporate subtle sound-wave inspired light trails and abstract audio visualizations that fade into the background. Use minimal Sony-inspired design language with clean spacing and strong visual hierarchy.

Add a soft ambient glow around the product to create a premium floating effect without appearing excessive. The overall design should feel modern, sophisticated, and worthy of a flagship technology campaign from Sony, Apple, or Bose.

Typography Layout

Main Headline:
Premium Sound. Ultimate Focus.

Subheadline:
Experience immersive wireless audio with industry-leading noise cancellation and exceptional comfort.

Feature Highlights:
✓ Adaptive Noise Cancelling
✓ Up to 55 Hours Battery Life
✓ 40mm Dynamic Drivers
✓ Multipoint Device Connection
✓ Fast Charging
✓ Hi-Res Audio & LDAC

CTA Button:
Shop Now on Takealot

Design Style

  • Premium technology advertising

  • Luxury product photography

  • Dark sophisticated color palette

  • Mobile-first readability

  • High-end eCommerce aesthetic

  • Modern retail campaign quality

  • Minimalist composition

  • Clean typography

  • Realistic lighting and reflections

  • Professional studio photography

  • Strong contrast and visual hierarchy

Visual Effects

  • Soft volumetric lighting

  • Subtle glass reflections

  • Floating product effect

  • Audio-wave inspired glow accents

  • Depth created through shadows and layered lighting

  • Premium metallic texture enhancement

  • Luxury technology campaign aesthetic

Technical Specifications

  • 1040 × 1040 px

  • Instagram Feed Ready

  • Facebook Ready

  • X (Twitter) Ready

  • High-resolution PNG

  • Ultra-detailed commercial advertising quality

  • Photorealistic rendering

  • 8K product photography style

Color Palette

  • Matte Black

  • Graphite Grey

  • Deep Navy

  • Soft White Typography

  • Subtle Electric Blue Accent Glow

Inspiration References

  • Sony WH-1000XM Campaigns

  • Apple AirPods Max Product Ads

  • Bose QuietComfort Campaigns

  • Bang & Olufsen Luxury Advertising

  • Nothing Technology Product Marketing

  • Takealot Featured Product Promotions

The final advertisement should instantly communicate premium quality, focus, comfort, and immersive sound, while maintaining a clean, conversion-driven retail design suitable for a featured Takealot campaign.

• Modern retail advertising

ChatGPT said:

Hi Melissa,

One of our key clients, Chery Johannesburg, has commissioned us to create a premium social media advertisement for the Chery Tiggo 8 Pro (vehicle image attached).

As you know, maintaining our strong relationship with Chery is extremely important, so the quality of this creative needs to reflect a high-end, agency-level standard.

Project Objective

Create a minimal, modern, highly engaging, and conversion-focused product advertisement that positions the Chery Tiggo 8 Pro as a premium vehicle while maintaining a clean and sophisticated visual aesthetic.

Key Requirements

  • The vehicle must be the hero element of the design.

  • The advertisement should prominently display the monthly instalment amount, starting from a minimum monthly repayment value in South African Rand (R).

  • The design should feel premium, modern, and aspirational.

  • Strong visual hierarchy with excellent readability on mobile devices.

  • Suitable for social media platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and X.

  • Use professional automotive advertising standards comparable to leading vehicle brands.

Important Note

Please do not include vehicle specifications, technical features, or performance highlights in this advertisement.

The focus should be on:

  • The vehicle's premium appearance

  • Affordability through the monthly instalment offer

  • Strong visual impact

  • Brand perception

  • Lead generation and conversion

The final result should be clean, elegant, visually compelling, and worthy of a featured automotive campaign.

Here's a professional LinkedIn caption that focuses on your design work and creative thinking:

Exploring premium automotive advertising and visual storytelling.

For this concept, I focused on creating a clean, modern, and conversion-driven advertisement that places the product at the center of the experience while maintaining strong visual hierarchy and brand presence.

The goal was to balance premium aesthetics with marketing effectiveness through:
• Minimalist design principles
• Strategic typography
• Strong product focus
• High-contrast visual hierarchy
• Mobile-first readability
• Premium lighting and depth

Great advertising isn't just about making a product look good—it's about creating an experience that captures attention and communicates value within seconds.

#GraphicDesign #AdvertisingDesign #AutomotiveDesign #BrandDesign #VisualDesign #CreativeDirection #MarketingDesign #DigitalDesign #DesignInspiration #PortfolioProject

Hi Melissa,

One of our key clients, Discovery Bank, has commissioned us to create a premium family-focused social media advertisement using the family holiday image they have provided.

As you know, maintaining our strong relationship with Discovery Bank is extremely important, so the quality of this creative needs to reflect a high-end, agency-level standard and align with the premium positioning of the Discovery brand.

Project Objective

Create a minimal, modern, highly engaging, and conversion-focused social media advertisement that evokes family connection, memorable experiences, financial freedom, and lifestyle aspirations while maintaining a clean and sophisticated visual aesthetic.

Key Requirements

  • The family image must be the hero element of the design.

  • The advertisement should prominently display a minimum amount in South African Rand (R).

  • The design should feel premium, modern, warm, and aspirational.

  • Strong visual hierarchy with excellent readability across mobile devices.

  • Suitable for social media platforms including Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and X.

  • Use premium financial-services advertising standards comparable to leading banking and lifestyle brands.

Design Direction

  • Minimal and elegant layout

  • Clean typography

  • Strong emotional appeal

  • Premium lifestyle-focused imagery

  • Sophisticated use of whitespace

  • Modern visual hierarchy

  • High-end retail and banking campaign quality

Desired Outcome

The final creative should communicate trust, family, lifestyle, and opportunity while remaining visually compelling and conversion-driven. It should feel polished, modern, and worthy of a featured Discovery Bank campaign.

Please also include the following credit within the creative in a subtle and professional manner:

The placement should be discreet and not compete with the primary campaign messaging or visual hierarchy.

Based on what you've already mentioned, I would adjust the direction as follows:

  • The family image remains the hero element.

  • Minimal text and messaging.

  • Strong use of whitespace.

  • Premium typography.

  • No cluttered icons, badges, or excessive callouts.

  • One clear headline.

  • One supporting line.

  • The minimum Rand amount displayed prominently but elegantly.

  • Soft premium color palette aligned with Discovery Bank branding.

  • Lifestyle-focused rather than sales-focused.

  • Modern banking campaign aesthetic similar to premium financial brands.

  • Mobile-first readability.

  • Emotional storytelling through the image rather than excessive copy.

The final creative should feel more like a premium Discovery lifestyle campaign and less like a traditional retail advertisement.

You said:


ChatGPT said:

This image is actually perfect for a premium Discovery Bank lifestyle campaign because it sells an emotion rather than a product. The focus should be on family, freedom, travel, experiences, and financial confidence.

I would recommend sending Melissa a revised brief like this:

Hi Melissa,

One of our key clients, Discovery Bank, has commissioned us to create a premium lifestyle-focused social media advertisement using the attached family beach image.

As you know, maintaining our relationship with Discovery Bank is extremely important, so this creative must reflect a premium, agency-level standard and align with Discovery's positioning as a modern and aspirational financial brand.

Important Creative Direction

This should not feel like a traditional promotional advert.

Instead, it should feel like a premium lifestyle campaign that communicates family, freedom, memorable experiences, travel, and financial confidence.

The attached image is already emotionally strong, so the design should allow the photography to do most of the storytelling.

Design Style

  • Minimal and sophisticated

  • Premium banking aesthetic

  • Clean typography

  • Large amounts of whitespace

  • Elegant visual hierarchy

  • Emotion-driven storytelling

  • Modern and aspirational

  • Mobile-first readability

Key Requirements

  • The family beach image must remain the hero element.

  • Include a minimum amount in South African Rand (R) as part of the offer.

  • Keep copy concise and impactful.

  • Avoid clutter, excessive icons, feature lists, badges, or promotional elements.

  • The design should feel calm, premium, and trustworthy.

Visual Inspiration

Think:

  • American Express lifestyle campaigns

  • Apple lifestyle advertising

  • Discovery Bank premium campaigns

  • Luxury travel brand advertising

  • High-end financial services marketing

Suggested Layout Structure

Discovery Bank logo

Headline:
"More Moments. More Memories."

Supporting Copy:
"Turn family experiences into unforgettable memories with financial solutions designed around your lifestyle."

Offer:
"From RXXX p/m"

CTA:
"Learn More"

Desired Outcome

The final creative should evoke emotion before promotion.

When someone sees the advert, they should immediately think about family, freedom, travel, and creating lasting memories—not banking products.

Please also include a subtle credit line:

"Proudly Designed by Ababalwe Jali"

The placement should be discreet and should not interfere with the visual hierarchy of the campaign.

For this specific image, I would avoid loud banking messaging and instead use a luxury lifestyle approach similar to what Apple, Discovery Vitality, or premium travel brands would do. The family walking toward the ocean is already carrying most of the emotional weight, so the design should stay extremely minimal.

As you know, maintaining our strong relationship with Capitec Bank is extremely important, so the quality of this creative must reflect a high-end, agency-level standard and align with Capitec's modern, accessible, and customer-focused brand positioning.

Project Objective

Create a highly engaging, modern, and conversion-focused social media advertisement that showcases the Capitec Banking App while maintaining a clean, minimal, and premium visual aesthetic.

  • Minimal and sophisticated

  • Modern and mobile-first

  • Clean and uncluttered

  • Premium yet approachable

  • Trustworthy and professional

The supplied app visual should remain the hero element of the design.

  • Use strong visual hierarchy and excellent whitespace management.

  • Avoid clutter, excessive text, or unnecessary graphic elements.

  • Ensure readability across mobile devices and social media platforms.

ChatGPT said:

This image is actually very well suited for a Clientele Ultimate Dignity Funeral Plan campaign because it communicates what funeral cover is ultimately about: protecting families, preserving peace of mind, and securing the future of loved ones.

Recommended Creative Direction

Headline
Protect What Matters Most.

Supporting Copy
Get up to R500,000 Family Cover with the Clientele Ultimate Dignity Funeral Plan.

CTA
Learn More

Layout Recommendation

Top Left

  • Clientele Logo

Center Left

  • Headline

  • Supporting copy

Bottom Left

  • Cover amount:
    Up to R500,000 Family Cover

Bottom Right

  • CTA Button

Footer

  • Proudly Designed by Ababalwe Jali

Design Style

  • Premium white typography

  • Soft warm gradient overlay for text readability

  • Large amounts of negative space

  • No feature icons

  • No excessive badges

  • No multiple callouts

  • Modern insurance advertising aesthetic

  • Emotion-driven storytelling

Why This Image Works

The family walking together on the beach creates associations with:

  • Family protection

  • Security

  • Stability

  • Future planning

  • Togetherness

  • Peace of mind

Those emotions align naturally with a funeral cover product without needing to visually reference funerals or insurance paperwork.

The final creative should feel closer to a premium lifestyle campaign than a traditional insurance advertisement. A viewer should first see a happy, protected family and then discover the insurance offering through clean, understated messaging. This approach will feel more premium, modern, and aligned with current financial-services advertising standards.

Hi Melissa,

One of our key clients, JONSSON Workwear, has commissioned us to create a premium Father's Day social media advertisement using the supplied campaign image.

As you know, maintaining our strong relationship with JONSSON Workwear is extremely important, so the quality of this creative must reflect a high-end, agency-level standard while remaining aligned with the brand's reputation for durability, professionalism, and hardworking South Africans.

Project Objective

Create a premium, minimal, and emotionally engaging Father's Day advertisement that celebrates fathers, mentors, providers, and hardworking men who show up every day for their families and communities.

The creative should feel authentic, aspirational, and respectful while maintaining a clean and modern visual aesthetic.

Design Direction

The supplied image should remain the hero element of the campaign.

The overall design should feel:

  • Minimal and sophisticated

  • Premium and modern

  • Masculine and professional

  • Emotionally meaningful

  • Brand-focused

  • Social media friendly

  • Conversion-driven without feeling overly promotional

Creative Approach

Rather than creating a typical Father's Day promotion, the advertisement should celebrate the values that define great fathers:

  • Hard work

  • Dedication

  • Leadership

  • Reliability

  • Strength

  • Commitment

The visual should feel authentic and relatable to the JONSSON Workwear audience.

Suggested Messaging Direction

Headline
Built for Work. Made for Fatherhood.

Alternative Headline Options

  • Celebrating the Men Who Build Our Future.

  • Strength Beyond the Job.

  • For the Fathers Who Lead by Example.

  • Honouring Hardworking Fathers This Father's Day.

Supporting Copy
This Father's Day, we celebrate the dedication, resilience, and commitment of fathers who work hard every day to provide for those who matter most.

Design Requirements

  • Strong visual hierarchy

  • Clean typography

  • Premium use of whitespace

  • Minimal copy

  • Modern workwear advertising aesthetic

  • Professional and polished execution

  • Suitable for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and X

Think:

  • CAT Workwear campaigns

  • Carhartt advertising

  • Premium lifestyle workwear brands

  • Modern outdoor apparel campaigns

  • Editorial-style commercial photography

Deliverables

  • Social media-ready creative

  • High-resolution export

  • Premium agency-quality execution

Credit

Please include the following credit discreetly within the creative:

Proudly Designed by Ababalwe Jali

The credit should be subtle, professional, and positioned so that it does not compete with the primary campaign message or visual hierarchy.

The final outcome should feel powerful, premium, authentic, and worthy of a featured JONSSON Workwear Father's Day campaign.

You said:

Which other social media advertisement that are trending in the market in South Africa

ChatGPT said:

In South Africa, the highest-performing social media advertisements in 2025 are generally not the traditional "Buy Now" style ads. Brands are investing heavily in lifestyle-driven, emotionally engaging, and premium visual campaigns that feel native to social platforms.

Here are some of the most effective and trending advertisement styles:

1. Lifestyle Advertising

Popular among:

  • Discovery Bank

  • Capitec

  • Nedbank

  • FNB

  • Standard Bank

Instead of promoting products directly, these ads sell:

  • Family moments

  • Travel experiences

  • Financial freedom

  • Success stories

  • Personal growth

Why it works: People connect with emotions before products.

2. Premium Product Hero Ads

Popular among:

  • Takealot

  • Samsung

  • Sony

  • Apple Resellers

  • JBL

Characteristics:

  • Product is the main focus

  • Minimal copy

  • Premium lighting

  • Clean backgrounds

  • Strong typography

Why it works: Makes products feel aspirational and premium.

3. Father's Day / Mother's Day Emotional Campaigns

Popular among:

  • JONSSON Workwear

  • Clientele

  • Old Mutual

  • Momentum

Characteristics:

  • Storytelling

  • Real-life imagery

  • Emotional headlines

  • Minimal design

Why it works: Creates high engagement and sharing.

4. Luxury Automotive Campaigns

Popular among:

  • Chery

  • BMW

  • Mercedes-Benz

  • Toyota

  • Ford

Characteristics:

  • Dark premium backgrounds

  • Large vehicle visuals

  • Financing offers

  • Minimal text

  • Cinematic lighting

Why it works: Creates desire and perceived value.

Example Headlines

  • Own More for Less

  • From R4,999 p/m

  • Designed for Every Journey

5. Fintech & Banking App Ads

Popular among:

  • Capitec

  • TymeBank

  • Discovery Bank

  • FNB App

Characteristics:

  • Phone mockups

  • App screenshots

  • Modern gradients

  • Clean UI

  • Large benefit statement

Why it works: Shows the actual product experience.

6. Sale & Promotion Ads (Modern Version)

Popular among:

  • Markham

  • Sportscene

  • Totalsports

  • H&M

  • Adidas

Characteristics:

  • Large percentage discount

  • Minimal layout

  • Product-focused

  • High contrast typography

Why it works: Users immediately understand the offer.

7. "Success Moment" Ads

Popular among:

  • Nedbank

  • Old Mutual

  • Sanlam

  • Momentum

Examples:

  • Getting approved

  • Buying a home

  • Starting a business

  • Reaching a savings goal

Why it works: People imagine themselves achieving the same outcome.

8. Editorial Magazine-Style Ads

A rapidly growing trend in South Africa.

Popular among:

  • Truworths

  • Woolworths

  • Foschini

  • Markham

  • Luxury beauty brands

Characteristics:

  • Vogue-inspired layouts

  • Large typography

  • Fashion photography

  • Editorial design

Why it works: Feels premium and highly shareable.

9. AI & SaaS Style Ads

One of the fastest-growing design trends.

Popular among:

  • Software companies

  • Startups

  • Technology brands

Characteristics:

  • Glassmorphism

  • Dark themes

  • Gradient glows

  • Floating UI cards

  • Modern illustrations

Why it works: Looks innovative and future-focused.

10. Before & After / Transformation Ads

Popular among:

  • Education brands

  • Fitness brands

  • Financial services

  • Home improvement companies

Characteristics:

  • Visual comparison

  • Strong headline

  • Clear outcome

Why it works: Instantly communicates value.

The Highest-Converting Style Right Now

If you're creating work for clients such as Discovery Bank, Clientele, Capitec, Chery, Nedbank, or JONSSON Workwear, the strongest combination is:

Premium Lifestyle Photography + Minimal Layout + Emotional Headline + Clear Offer + Modern Typography

This approach is currently dominating LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and X because it balances brand perception with conversion performance. It feels premium enough for large brands while still driving engagement and leads.


You said:

Which other social media advertisement that are trending in the market here in south Africa

ChatGPT said:

Beyond the common banking, retail, and automotive campaigns, there are several high-performing advertisement styles currently gaining traction in South Africa, especially among brands targeting millennials, Gen Z, professionals, and middle-income consumers.

1. "Day in the Life" Campaigns

Popular with:

  • Capitec

  • FNB

  • Samsung

  • Huawei

  • Vodacom

The advert follows someone's daily routine:

  • Morning coffee

  • Work

  • Gym

  • Shopping

  • Family time

The product becomes part of the story rather than the focus.

Why it trends: Feels authentic and relatable.

2. User-Generated Content (UGC) Style Ads

Popular with:

  • Takealot

  • Temu

  • Checkers Sixty60

  • Mr D

Characteristics:

  • Looks like content shot on a phone

  • Real people

  • Natural reactions

  • Less polished

Why it trends: People trust real experiences more than polished advertising.

3. Premium "Black Card" Style Ads

Popular with:

  • Discovery Bank

  • American Express

  • Nedbank Private Wealth

Characteristics:

  • Dark backgrounds

  • Metallic effects

  • Premium cards

  • Minimal copy

  • Luxury typography

Why it trends: Creates exclusivity.

4. Luxury Travel & Lifestyle Campaigns

Popular with:

  • Discovery Vitality

  • Flight Centre

  • Booking platforms

  • Insurance brands

Visuals:

  • Beach resorts

  • Families travelling

  • Luxury hotels

  • International destinations

Why it trends: South Africans are increasingly spending on experiences rather than possessions.

5. Minimal Product-in-Environment Ads

Popular with:

  • Sony

  • Apple Resellers

  • Samsung

  • JBL

Example:
Headphones resting on a couch.
Phone on a desk.
Laptop in a coffee shop.

Why it trends: Makes products feel part of everyday life.

6. "Built for South Africans" Campaigns

Popular with:

  • JONSSON Workwear

  • Toyota SA

  • Capitec

  • Old Mutual

Themes:

  • Hard work

  • Community

  • Family

  • Entrepreneurship

Why it trends: Local relevance performs exceptionally well.

7. Financial Freedom Campaigns

Popular with:

  • Old Mutual

  • Momentum

  • Sanlam

  • Nedbank

Visuals:

  • Young professionals

  • First homes

  • Small businesses

  • Savings milestones

Why it trends: Aspirational content drives engagement.

8. Magazine-Style Fashion Covers

Popular with:

  • Markham

  • Truworths

  • Woolworths

  • Foschini

Visuals:

  • Vogue-inspired layouts

  • Editorial photography

  • Large typography

  • Minimal design

Why it trends: Highly shareable on LinkedIn and Instagram.

9. Motion Graphic Ads

Growing rapidly across:

  • Banking

  • Telecoms

  • Insurance

  • SaaS

Features:

  • Animated text

  • Floating UI screens

  • Kinetic typography

  • Micro-interactions

Why it trends: Motion significantly increases engagement and watch time.

10. AI-Generated Concept Campaigns

A major trend in 2025.

Popular among:

  • Creative agencies

  • Startups

  • Technology brands

Visuals:

  • Futuristic environments

  • Hyper-realistic renders

  • Cinematic lighting

  • Glassmorphism

Why it trends: High visual impact and lower production costs.

The Most In-Demand Styles for Client Work Right Now

If you're producing portfolio pieces or client concepts for South African brands, these are the five styles worth mastering:

  1. Premium Lifestyle Advertising

  2. Luxury Automotive Campaigns

  3. Fintech & Banking App Advertisements

  4. Editorial Magazine-Style Fashion Campaigns

  5. Minimal Product Hero Advertisements

These styles consistently appear across campaigns from major South African brands and align closely with what marketing managers, creative directors, and agencies are currently commissioning.

Provide me with a polished message to instruct the head of design, Melissa here at work to design a social Media advert for Checkers sixty60. This has to reflect agency level. This is for one of our top clients that we are in partnership with. Checkers Sixty60 advertising a gas heater product since we are approaching winter with a South African amount.

ChatGPT said:

Here's a polished brief you can send to Melissa:

Hi Melissa,

One of our key clients, Checkers Sixty60, has commissioned us to create a premium social media advertisement promoting a gas heater product as we approach the winter season.

As you know, maintaining our strong partnership with Checkers Sixty60 is extremely important, so the quality of this creative must reflect a high-end, agency-level standard while remaining aligned with the modern, convenient, and customer-focused positioning of the Sixty60 brand.

Project Objective

Create a premium, highly engaging, and conversion-focused social media advertisement that positions the gas heater as an essential winter household product.

The creative should immediately communicate warmth, comfort, convenience, and affordability while maintaining a clean, modern, and premium visual aesthetic.

Core Requirement

The advertisement must prominently feature:

  • The gas heater as the hero product

  • A clear South African Rand (R) price point

  • Checkers Sixty60 branding

  • A strong winter-focused message

Design Direction

The overall visual style should be:

  • Minimal and premium

  • Modern retail advertising

  • Clean and uncluttered

  • Mobile-first and highly readable

  • Conversion-focused

  • Suitable for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and X

Creative Approach

The advert should communicate the feeling of coming home to warmth during the colder months.

The design should focus on:

  • Comfort

  • Warmth

  • Convenience

  • Seasonal relevance

  • Value for money

Suggested Messaging Direction

Headline
Stay Warm This Winter.

Alternative Headlines

  • Winter Comfort Starts Here.

  • Beat the Cold in Style.

  • Warmth Delivered to Your Door.

  • Essential Winter Comfort.

Supporting Copy
Keep your home warm and comfortable this winter with reliable heating delivered through Checkers Sixty60.

Price Callout
From RXXX

CTA
Shop Now

Design Requirements

  • Product must be the primary focal point.

  • Strong visual hierarchy.

  • Premium typography.

  • Modern composition with generous whitespace.

  • Subtle winter-inspired visual treatment.

  • Premium lighting, shadows, and depth.

  • Retail advertising quality comparable to leading eCommerce brands.

Visual Inspiration

Think:

  • Apple product advertising

  • Takealot promotional campaigns

  • Premium Checkers Sixty60 retail creatives

  • Modern appliance advertising

  • High-end eCommerce product campaigns

Deliverables

  • Social media-ready creative

  • High-resolution export

  • Premium agency-quality execution

Credit

Please include the following credit discreetly within the creative:

Proudly Designed by Ababalwe Jali

The placement should remain subtle and professional, ensuring it does not compete with the primary campaign messaging or overall visual hierarchy.

Desired Outcome

The final creative should feel premium, trustworthy, modern, and seasonally relevant. It should capture attention instantly, communicate value clearly, and be worthy of a featured Checkers Sixty60 winter campaign.

Hi Melissa,

One of our key clients, Sportscene, has commissioned us to design a premium gift bag packaging concept to be used across their retail experience.

As you know, maintaining our strong partnership with Sportscene is extremely important, so this deliverable must reflect a high-end, agency-level standard while staying true to the brand’s youthful, urban, and fashion-forward identity.

Project Objective

Design a premium, unisex gift bag packaging concept that enhances the in-store and post-purchase customer experience.

The packaging should feel like an extension of the Sportscene brand experience — not just a carrier bag, but a lifestyle statement.

Design Direction

The gift bag should be:

  • Premium and modern

  • Gender-neutral (suitable for both male and female customers)

  • Urban and streetwear-inspired

  • Minimal yet bold

  • Highly brand recognisable

  • Suitable for retail and shopping mall environments

Creative Approach

The design should reflect Sportscene’s position as a leading streetwear retailer, aligned with global fashion and sneaker culture.

It should communicate:

  • Style

  • Identity

  • Youth culture

  • Confidence

  • Urban lifestyle energy

Visual Style

Think:

  • Nike retail packaging aesthetics

  • Adidas Originals minimalist branding

  • Supreme-inspired bold identity elements

  • High-end streetwear shopping experience

  • Clean monochrome or limited colour palette with strong brand accents

Key Requirements

  • Must work for both genders (unisex design)

  • Strong brand visibility and recognition

  • Premium material feel implied in the design (texture, embossing, matte/gloss contrast)

  • Minimal clutter with strong graphic identity

  • Suitable for physical production (print-ready thinking)

Deliverables

  • Gift bag front, back, and side design concepts

  • High-resolution print-ready artwork

  • Social mockups for presentation (optional but preferred)

Visual Inspiration

Think:

  • Premium sneaker retail packaging

  • Global streetwear brand shopping experiences

  • High-end mall retail gift bags

  • Contemporary fashion branding systems

Credit

Please include the following credit subtly within the design:

Proudly Designed by Ababalwe Jali

The credit must remain discreet and should not interfere with brand identity or primary visual composition.

Desired Outcome

The final concept should feel premium, culturally relevant, and instantly recognisable as Sportscene. It should elevate the customer experience from purchase to packaging, reinforcing the brand as a leader in modern streetwear retail.

Hi Melissa,

One of our key clients, Portia M, has commissioned us to create a premium social media product advertisement campaign featuring their Marula skincare range using the supplied product imagery.

As you know, maintaining our strong partnership with Portia M is extremely important, so the quality of this creative must reflect a high-end, agency-level standard while positioning the brand as a trusted leader in skincare and beauty.

Project Objective

Create a premium, modern, and conversion-focused social media advertisement that showcases the Portia M Marula skincare range in a way that feels aspirational, luxurious, and professional.

The campaign should communicate healthy, radiant, nourished skin while reinforcing the natural benefits of Marula-infused skincare.

Design Direction

The supplied products should remain the hero elements of the advertisement.

The overall visual direction should be:

  • Premium and elegant

  • Minimal and sophisticated

  • Beauty-industry standard

  • Clean and modern

  • Mobile-first and highly readable

  • Suitable for paid and organic social campaigns

  • Consistent with leading skincare and cosmetics brands

Creative Approach

The advert should immediately communicate:

  • Healthy skin

  • Natural beauty

  • Self-care

  • Hydration and nourishment

  • Confidence

  • Everyday skincare luxury

The products should be beautifully presented with premium lighting, realistic shadows, reflections, and subtle beauty-inspired visual effects.

Visual Style

Think:

  • Fenty Skin campaigns

  • The Ordinary advertising

  • CeraVe premium product visuals

  • Dove premium skincare campaigns

  • Luxury beauty editorials

  • Modern cosmetic retail advertising

Suggested Messaging Direction

Headline
Glow Naturally with Portia M.

Alternative Headlines

  • Nature's Secret to Radiant Skin.

  • Nourish. Hydrate. Glow.

  • Powered by Marula.

  • Healthy Skin Starts Here.

  • Your Everyday Skincare Essential.

Supporting Copy
Discover the nourishing power of Marula with a skincare range designed to leave your skin feeling healthy, hydrated, and beautifully radiant.

Design Requirements

  • Products must be the primary focal point.

  • Premium beauty-advertising aesthetic.

  • Strong visual hierarchy.

  • Elegant typography.

  • Strategic use of whitespace.

  • Soft shadows and realistic reflections.

  • Subtle golden glow elements inspired by Marula oil.

  • Clean background with premium gradients.

  • Luxury retail quality execution.

  • Suitable for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X, and beauty-focused campaigns.

Optional Premium Elements

Consider incorporating:

  • Marula fruit imagery

  • Golden oil droplets

  • Soft botanical accents

  • Glass reflections

  • Luxury skincare textures

  • Subtle glow effects

These should remain tasteful and not distract from the products.

Deliverables

  • 1080 × 1080 Social Media Advertisement

  • High-resolution PNG export

  • Editable source file

  • Premium agency-quality execution

Credit

Please include the following credit discreetly within the creative:

Proudly Designed by Ababalwe Jali

The credit should remain subtle and professional, ensuring it does not compete with the primary campaign messaging or overall visual hierarchy.

Desired Outcome

The final creative should feel luxurious, trustworthy, modern, and aspirational. It should be visually comparable to premium skincare campaigns from leading international beauty brands while maintaining Portia M's identity as a proudly African skincare brand built around the natural benefits of Marula.

As you know, maintaining our strong partnership with Sportscene is extremely important, so the quality of this creative must reflect a high-end, agency-level standard while staying true to Sportscene's position as one of South Africa's leading streetwear and sneaker retailers.

Project Objective

Create a premium, highly engaging, and conversion-focused social media advertisement that showcases the iconic Nike Air Force 1 as a must-have sneaker for both men and women.

The final creative should feel modern, fashionable, aspirational, and worthy of a featured Sportscene campaign.

Product Information

Product: Nike Air Force 1
Retail Price: R2,399

Design Direction

The supplied sneaker image should remain the hero element of the advertisement.

The overall visual style should be:

  • Premium and modern

  • Minimal and fashion-forward

  • Streetwear-inspired

  • Gender-neutral

  • Clean and uncluttered

  • Mobile-first and highly readable

  • Suitable for Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, and digital retail campaigns

The creative should communicate:

  • Style

  • Confidence

  • Versatility

  • Street culture

  • Premium fashion

Alternative Headlines

  • Timeless. Clean. Essential.

  • Step Into Iconic.

  • The Sneaker That Defined Generations.

  • Everyday Style Starts Here.

  • Built for Every Fit.

Price Callout
R2,399

This price should be clearly visible and integrated into the visual hierarchy without overpowering the design.

Design Requirements

  • Product must be the primary focal point.

  • Strong typography hierarchy.

  • Premium use of whitespace.

  • Modern fashion-retail composition.

  • Clean background with subtle shadows and depth.

  • Premium lighting treatment.

  • Contemporary streetwear advertising aesthetic.

  • SNIPES retail creatives

Provide me with a polished message to instruct the head of design, Melissa here at work to design a brochure for Standard Bank with few of other pages. This has to reflect a 5 star agency level. This is for one of our top clients that we are in partnership with. https://www.standardbank.com/sbg/standard-bank-group.

ChatGPT said:

Here's a polished creative brief you can send to Melissa:

Hi Melissa,

One of our key clients, Standard Bank, has commissioned us to design a premium corporate brochure that showcases the bank's services, value proposition, innovation, customer commitment, and leadership within the African financial sector.

As you know, maintaining our strong partnership with Standard Bank is extremely important, so this deliverable must reflect a true 5-star agency-level standard. The final brochure should feel sophisticated, trustworthy, modern, and aligned with the visual quality expected from one of Africa's largest and most respected financial institutions.

Project Objective

Design a premium multi-page corporate brochure that positions Standard Bank as a trusted financial partner for individuals, businesses, entrepreneurs, and corporate clients.

The brochure should communicate confidence, financial growth, innovation, stability, and opportunity while maintaining a clean and highly professional corporate aesthetic.

Design Direction

The brochure should be:

  • Premium and executive-level

  • Modern and sophisticated

  • Clean and minimal

  • Corporate yet approachable

  • Trustworthy and authoritative

  • Consistent with Standard Bank's brand identity

  • Suitable for both print and digital distribution

Visual Style

The overall design should reflect:

  • Global banking standards

  • Premium financial institution branding

  • Modern annual report aesthetics

  • Corporate editorial design

  • Executive presentation quality

Think:

  • Standard Bank Investor Reports

  • Deloitte Corporate Publications

  • PwC Brand Publications

  • HSBC Corporate Brochures

  • Goldman Sachs Investor Documents

  • McKinsey Executive Reports

Suggested Brochure Structure

Cover Page

  • Standard Bank logo

  • Powerful hero image

  • Corporate headline

  • Premium visual composition

  • Clean use of whitespace

Suggested Headline:
Banking for Growth. Building Africa's Future.

Page 2 – About Standard Bank

Introduce the bank's heritage, purpose, footprint, and commitment to helping clients achieve financial success.

Content Focus:

  • Company overview

  • Market leadership

  • African presence

  • Vision and mission

Page 3 – Personal Banking

Highlight solutions available for individuals.

Include:

  • Transactional accounts

  • Savings accounts

  • Credit solutions

  • Digital banking

  • Mobile banking

Page 4 – Business Banking

Showcase services for SMEs and entrepreneurs.

Include:

  • Business accounts

  • Funding solutions

  • Cash flow management

  • Merchant services

  • Growth support

Page 5 – Corporate & Investment Banking

Position Standard Bank as a strategic financial partner.

Include:

  • Corporate banking

  • Investment solutions

  • Trade finance

  • Treasury services

  • Infrastructure financing

Page 6 – Digital Innovation

Focus on technology and customer convenience.

Include:

  • Mobile banking

  • Online banking

  • Digital transformation

  • Security features

  • Customer experience initiatives

Page 7 – Why Choose Standard Bank

Use visually engaging statistics and trust indicators.

Potential Content:

  • Years of experience

  • African footprint

  • Customer base

  • Innovation achievements

  • Financial strength

Page 8 – Customer Success & Impact

Showcase real-world impact.

Focus on:

  • Entrepreneurs

  • Families

  • Communities

  • Business growth

  • Economic development

Back Cover

Include:

  • Contact information

  • Website

  • Social channels

  • QR code

  • Closing brand statement

Suggested Closing:
Moving Forward Together.

Design Requirements

  • Strong visual hierarchy

  • Premium typography

  • Consistent spacing system

  • Professional photography

  • Modern iconography

  • Infographics and data visualisation

  • Executive-level layout quality

  • Print-ready production standards

  • High readability across all pages

Colour Palette

Use Standard Bank's brand colours as the foundation while incorporating:

  • Deep corporate blues

  • Clean whites

  • Sophisticated greys

  • Subtle accent colours where appropriate

Deliverables

  • Full multi-page brochure design

  • Print-ready PDF

  • Editable source files

  • High-resolution exports

  • Professional presentation mockups

Credit

Please include the following credit discreetly on the back page:

Proudly Designed by Ababalwe Jali

The credit should remain subtle and professional, ensuring it does not compete with Standard Bank's branding or content.

Desired Outcome

The final brochure should feel comparable to the quality produced by leading international design agencies for global financial institutions. It should inspire confidence, communicate expertise, and reinforce Standard Bank's position as a trusted financial leader across Africa.

Provide me with a polished message to instruct the head of design, Melissa here at work to design a mailer boxes with a double peel & seal for Bravery. This has to reflect a 5 star agency level. This is for one of our top clients that we are in partnership with Bravery. Bravery is an innovative skiwear brand that helps women feel strong and comfortable on the slope. @braveryskiwear chose our FSC-certified mailer boxes with a double peel & seal to make fulfilment fast and returns easy. Recyclable wrapping paper and stickers add a great touch to the best unboxing experience.
4/4

ChatGPT said:

Here's a polished creative brief you can send to Melissa:

Hi Melissa,

One of our key clients, Bravery Skiwear, has commissioned us to design a premium mailer box packaging experience featuring a double peel & seal system. This project is an important touchpoint in the customer journey, and as you know, maintaining our strong partnership with Bravery is a top priority.

The final packaging concept must reflect a true 5-star agency-level standard and deliver a memorable unboxing experience that aligns with Bravery's premium positioning in the women's skiwear market.

About the Brand

Bravery is an innovative women's skiwear brand that empowers women to feel strong, confident, and comfortable on the slopes.

The brand embodies:

  • Confidence

  • Adventure

  • Performance

  • Elegance

  • Modern femininity

  • Premium outdoor lifestyle

Project Objective

Design a premium eCommerce mailer box that not only protects the product but also elevates the overall customer experience from delivery through to unboxing and returns.

The packaging should feel like a luxury lifestyle product rather than a standard shipping box.

Packaging Requirements

Mailer Box

  • FSC-certified mailer box

  • Double peel & seal functionality

  • Designed for fast fulfilment

  • Easy customer returns

  • Sustainable and recyclable materials

Supporting Elements

  • Recyclable branded wrapping paper

  • Premium branded stickers

  • Thank-you card insert

  • Care instruction card

  • Returns information card

Design Direction

The packaging should be:

  • Premium and elegant

  • Minimal and sophisticated

  • Modern and fashion-forward

  • Sustainability-focused

  • Functional yet luxurious

  • Suitable for a premium female audience

Creative Approach

The unboxing experience should evoke the feeling of preparing for a ski adventure.

Every touchpoint should reinforce:

  • Strength

  • Confidence

  • Adventure

  • Performance

  • Premium quality

The customer should immediately feel that they have purchased from a high-end international outdoor apparel brand.

Visual Style

Think:

  • Moncler packaging

  • Perfect Moment branding

  • Goldbergh luxury skiwear

  • Lululemon premium packaging

  • Aritzia eCommerce packaging

  • High-end fashion subscription box experiences

Design Elements

Consider incorporating:

  • Minimal mountain-inspired graphics

  • Subtle contour lines

  • Snow-inspired textures

  • Elegant typography

  • Premium embossing effects

  • Spot UV finishes

  • Matte luxury surfaces

  • Soft monochromatic palettes

Exterior Mailer Box

The exterior should be clean and premium.

Potential messaging:

Bravery
Designed for women who move fearlessly.

or

Confidence Begins Before the First Run.

Interior Experience

When the customer opens the box, they should be greeted with an inspiring statement such as:

For Every Summit. Every Slope. Every Brave Moment.

or

Made for Women Who Lead Their Own Adventure.

Sustainability Messaging

Include subtle sustainability communication highlighting:

  • FSC-certified materials

  • Recyclable packaging

  • Responsible sourcing

  • Reduced environmental impact

Return Experience

Since the packaging uses a double peel & seal system, clearly communicate:

  • Easy returns

  • Re-seal functionality

  • Hassle-free customer experience

Deliverables

  • Mailer box exterior design

  • Mailer box interior design

  • Branded wrapping paper design

  • Branded sticker design

  • Thank-you card

  • Return instruction card

  • Presentation mockups

  • Print-ready production files

Credit

Please include the following credit discreetly within the presentation mockups only:

Proudly Designed by Ababalwe Jali

This should not appear on the actual customer-facing packaging but may be included in presentation materials.

Desired Outcome

The final packaging experience should feel comparable to premium international apparel brands and create a memorable first impression. It should balance luxury, functionality, sustainability, and brand storytelling while delivering an exceptional unboxing experience that customers will want to share and remember.

We just landed a new client this will be a long-term relationship with INFUSE Academy. As part of their first hiring process gave us a test assignment. At INFUSE Academy they don't do "corporate and boring". They create bright, bold, and insightful visual stories that help B2B marketers master complex frameworks. This assignment is designed to see how we handle their "vibe" and how we simplify complex ideas for a learning audience. The pdf file supported is the Test assignment for Graphic Designer at INFUSE Academy go through it to find what is expected. 4/4

ChatGPT said:

I reviewed the assignment you uploaded. It specifically asks for three visual deliverables, but your instruction is to focus only on Deliverable 1: "No matter how hard it looks, there is always a beginning."

Here's a polished creative brief you can send to Melissa:

Hi Melissa,

We've just landed a new client, INFUSE Academy, and this has the potential to become a long-term partnership. As part of their recruitment process, they've provided us with a design test assignment to evaluate our creative thinking, visual storytelling, and ability to simplify complex concepts through design.

I've attached the assignment brief for reference. Please review it carefully to understand the brand direction, expectations, and overall creative approach.

Important

For this task, you are NOT required to complete the entire assignment. Your focus should be only on Deliverable 1:

"No matter how hard it looks, there is always a beginning."

About INFUSE Academy

INFUSE Academy is very different from a traditional corporate brand.

They explicitly state that they do not create "corporate and boring" content. Instead, they produce bright, bold, energetic, insightful visual stories that help B2B marketers understand complex frameworks quickly and intuitively.

Their visuals are expected to educate through strong storytelling rather than heavy amounts of text.

Project Objective

Create a single static visual that communicates the idea:

"No matter how hard it looks, there is always a beginning."

The visual should immediately communicate hope, progress, growth, and confidence.

The audience should understand the message within seconds without requiring lengthy explanations.

Creative Direction

This should NOT look like a traditional corporate illustration.

Instead, it should feel:

  • Bright

  • Bold

  • Intelligent

  • Modern

  • Editorial

  • Inspirational

  • Human-centred

  • Visually memorable

The artwork should tell a story through composition, colour, and symbolism.

Visual Storytelling

Rather than illustrating difficulty itself, focus on the emotional transition from uncertainty to progress.

Potential metaphors include:

  • The first step of a staircase disappearing into light

  • A climber beginning an ascent toward a summit

  • The first puzzle piece being placed

  • A winding path leading toward opportunity

  • A blank canvas with the first confident brushstroke

  • A single domino beginning a chain reaction

  • A glowing doorway representing possibility

  • A bridge extending from uncertainty toward achievement

The emphasis should always be on starting, not finishing.

Style Direction

The final artwork should feel comparable to work published by:

  • Dropbox Design

  • Figma

  • Linear

  • Notion

  • Stripe

  • Canva

  • Google Design

  • Slack

  • Atlassian

Think modern editorial illustration combined with bold visual communication.

Colour Palette

Use vibrant, optimistic colours with strong contrast.

Avoid muted corporate palettes.

The design should feel energetic, approachable, and inspiring.

Typography

Typography should become part of the visual rather than simply sitting on top of it.

Large, confident headlines.

Minimal supporting text.

Excellent visual hierarchy.

Composition

The visual should breathe.

Use generous whitespace.

Strong focal point.

Clear eye flow.

Minimal distractions.

AI Usage

Although the assignment permits AI-generated imagery, the final deliverable must not look AI-generated.

Our expectation is that approximately 98% of the final outcome should appear as if it were crafted manually by an experienced designer.

If AI is used during concept exploration, it should only support ideation or asset generation. The final composition, layout, typography, colour grading, visual hierarchy, and storytelling should be professionally refined so that the work is visually indistinguishable from traditional agency-quality design.

Avoid any common AI characteristics, including:

  • Plastic-looking characters

  • Overly smooth skin

  • Unrealistic facial symmetry

  • Distorted anatomy

  • Artificial lighting

  • Generic compositions

  • Synthetic textures

  • Inconsistent perspective

The finished piece must feel authentic, intentional, and production-ready.

Deliverables

  • One static visual

  • 1920 × 1080 pixels

  • Presentation-ready quality

  • Agency-level execution

  • Suitable for inclusion in the INFUSE Academy submission deck

Success Criteria

The visual should instantly communicate that every great achievement begins with a single first step.

Without relying on excessive copy, the audience should immediately understand that no challenge is too great to begin—and that every journey starts somewhere.

The final piece should feel like a polished editorial campaign rather than a conventional corporate graphic. It should demonstrate exceptional concept development, storytelling, composition, and execution, showcasing the level of creativity expected from a world-class design agency.

ChatGPT said:

Creative Brief – Nike Website Hero Background Image

Hi Melissa,

We've just secured a new client, Nike, and this marks the beginning of what we expect to be a long-term partnership. For our first deliverable, we need to create a premium website hero background image that reflects Nike's world-class brand standards and demonstrates agency-level creative execution.

The image will serve as the hero background on the Nike website, so it must be visually striking while leaving sufficient negative space for the website's headline, navigation, and call-to-action buttons.

Reference Website: https://www.nike.com/za/

Project Objective

Design a cinematic, high-impact hero background that immediately communicates movement, determination, athletic performance, and inspiration. The image should embody Nike's "Just Do It" philosophy without relying on text or promotional graphics.

Important

This is not a banner advert.

This is not a social media post.

This is a website hero background image only.

Do not include:

  • Headlines

  • Body copy

  • CTA buttons

  • Logos or watermarks

  • Promotional badges

  • Product pricing

  • UI elements

The final image must be completely clean and ready to sit behind website content.

Creative Direction

The visual should feel:

  • Premium

  • Cinematic

  • Modern

  • Powerful

  • Inspirational

  • Editorial

  • Dynamic

  • Authentic

  • Minimal

The image should capture a single powerful athletic moment rather than appearing like a posed fashion shoot.

Subject

Feature an African athlete in motion wearing modern Nike sportswear and footwear.

Possible actions include:

  • Sprinting

  • Explosive jump

  • Dynamic warm-up

  • High-intensity training

  • Mid-stride run

  • Boxing movement

  • Fitness training

  • Basketball movement

  • Football training

The pose should communicate energy, focus, and determination.

AI Character Quality & Visual Authenticity

The athlete must look completely realistic and production-ready.

Please ensure:

  • Natural human skin texture

  • Authentic African skin tone

  • Dry, realistic skin (avoid glossy or plastic-looking skin)

  • Natural facial features

  • Human-like body proportions

  • Realistic muscle definition

  • Accurate anatomy

  • Natural hair texture

  • Realistic hands and fingers

  • Convincing facial expression

  • Cinematic lighting

  • Professional colour grading

Avoid common AI artefacts such as:

  • Plastic skin

  • Over-smoothed faces

  • Unrealistic symmetry

  • Distorted limbs or hands

  • Synthetic textures

  • Artificial-looking lighting

  • Floating objects or clothing

The final result should be indistinguishable from a professionally photographed Nike campaign.

Composition

The layout should support website content.

Consider:

  • Athlete positioned slightly off-centre

  • Generous negative space for text overlays

  • Strong visual depth

  • Layered composition

  • Natural eye flow

  • Clean framing

Environment

Choose a premium athletic setting such as:

  • Modern outdoor running track

  • Urban Johannesburg street at sunrise

  • Stadium tunnel

  • Indoor training facility

  • Basketball court

  • Rooftop training space

  • Minimal industrial gym

  • Contemporary athletics venue

The environment should enhance the athlete without competing for attention.

Lighting

Use cinematic, premium lighting:

  • Golden hour

  • Soft directional sunlight

  • Dramatic rim lighting

  • High-end sports photography aesthetic

The lighting should create depth, contrast, and atmosphere.

Colour Palette

Take inspiration from Nike's visual language:

  • Crisp whites

  • Deep blacks

  • Charcoal greys

  • Subtle neutral tones

  • Controlled accent colours from the apparel

Avoid oversaturated colours or distracting backgrounds.

Visual Style Inspiration

Aim for the quality and aesthetic of campaigns by:

  • Nike

  • Adidas

  • Under Armour

  • Puma

  • On Running

  • Lululemon

The overall feel should resemble a premium global sports campaign.

Deliverables

  • Website hero background image

  • High-resolution (minimum 3840 × 2160)

  • Landscape orientation

  • Optimised for desktop and responsive web

  • No text or branding embedded

  • Production-ready quality

Success Criteria

The final image should immediately communicate athletic excellence, confidence, and movement while maintaining a clean composition suitable for a modern website hero section. It should feel aspirational, authentic, and visually compelling—worthy of a global Nike campaign and representative of the creative quality expected from a top-tier design agency.
