ChatGPT said:

Creative Brief – Agency-Level Email Signature Design

Hi Melissa,

I'd like you to design a premium email signature for my professional correspondence. This signature will represent both my personal brand and Innsoft Ventures, so it needs to reflect the same level of quality and attention to detail that we deliver for our clients.

The design should be polished, modern, and professional—something that immediately reinforces credibility and leaves no doubt about the quality of our work.

Objective

Create an email signature that feels clean, sophisticated, and trustworthy while maintaining a strong visual identity. The signature should enhance every email I send without feeling cluttered or overly decorative.

Information to Include

Kind regards,

Ababalwe Jali
Product Designer | Innsoft Ventures

📞 +27 60 320 7047
✉️ mellokuhlejali@gmail.com
🔗 LinkedIn (icon linked to my profile)

Profile Image

Include a professional circular profile photo positioned to the left of the contact information. The image should integrate naturally into the layout with subtle styling and should not dominate the signature.

Design Direction

The signature should be:

  • Premium

  • Modern

  • Minimal

  • Executive

  • Elegant

  • Corporate

  • Timeless

  • Clean

  • Trustworthy

The overall impression should be that of someone working within a world-class digital product and design agency.

Layout

Create a balanced horizontal layout that includes:

  • Professional profile image

  • Name with strong visual hierarchy

  • Job title and company

  • Contact details with premium icons

  • LinkedIn icon

  • Subtle divider lines where appropriate

Ensure spacing is generous and typography is highly legible.

Typography

Use a modern sans-serif typeface.

Hierarchy should be clear:

  • Name: bold and most prominent

  • Job title: medium weight

  • Contact information: regular weight

The typography should feel refined and easy to scan.

Colour Palette

Use a restrained, professional palette:

  • White

  • Charcoal or dark grey

  • Black

  • A single accent colour inspired by the Innsoft Ventures brand

Avoid excessive colours, gradients, or visual distractions.

Icons

Use clean, consistent vector icons for:

  • Phone

  • Email

  • LinkedIn

Icons should be minimal and aligned with the overall aesthetic.

Branding

Include the Innsoft Ventures logo subtly within the signature.

The branding should reinforce professionalism without overpowering the contact information.

Responsive Considerations

The signature should render correctly across major email clients, including:

  • Gmail

  • Outlook

  • Apple Mail

It should remain clean and readable on both desktop and mobile devices.

What to Avoid

  • Heavy backgrounds

  • Large banners

  • Excessive colours

  • Oversized logos

  • Decorative effects

  • Busy layouts

  • Unnecessary social media icons beyond LinkedIn

Desired Outcome

The finished email signature should feel like it belongs to a senior product designer at a leading technology company or global design agency. Every detail—from typography and spacing to iconography and branding—should communicate professionalism, confidence, and attention to detail.

The final result should leave recipients with a strong first impression and reinforce the credibility of both Ababalwe Jali and Innsoft Ventures every time an email is sent.

Design Brief – Tandala Venues Gallery Image Enhancement

Hi Melissa,

We’ve just onboarded Tandala Venues as a new client, and this marks the beginning of what we expect to be a long-term partnership. For this reason, every visual we deliver must meet 5-star, agency-level quality and align with premium hospitality industry standards.

The client has provided the attached image, which will be featured in the Gallery section of their new website.

Objective

Your task is to refine and enhance the quality of the existing image while preserving its authenticity. This is a visual enhancement exercise—not a redesign.

Requirements

  • Do not change anything in the composition.

  • Preserve the camera angle, perspective, framing, architecture, landscaping, driveway, entrance gate, lighting direction, and all objects exactly as they appear.

  • No additions, removals, replacements, or repositioning of any elements.

  • Improve overall sharpness, clarity, colour balance, contrast, exposure, and dynamic range while maintaining a natural, premium appearance.

  • Enhance textures in the grass, walls, paving, trees, sky, and surrounding landscape.

  • Correct lens softness and compression artifacts without making the image look artificial or over-processed.

  • Produce a clean, crisp, high-resolution image suitable for a premium hospitality website.

  • Ensure the final result looks as though it was captured using a professional full-frame DSLR or mirrorless camera with high-end optics.

  • Maintain realistic colours and natural lighting throughout.

Quality Standard

The final image should be indistinguishable from professionally captured architectural photography and suitable for a luxury venue website. Visitors should immediately perceive the venue as premium, elegant, and well maintained.

Deliverable

  • High-resolution refined image (web-ready and master version)

  • No visible AI artifacts or over-processing

  • Premium, natural, production-ready finish

This refinement will be used directly on the Tandala Venues website, so attention to detail is essential. The final output should elevate the image while remaining completely faithful to the original scene.

Subject: Creative Brief – Instagram Social Media Advert | Mr Ntsimango Holiday Classes

Hi Melissa,

We've secured a new client, Mr Ntsimango, and this has the potential to become a long-term partnership. As part of building a strong relationship from the outset, I'd like this first campaign to reflect true agency-level quality—premium, modern, and highly engaging while remaining clean and minimal.

Creative Objective

Design a premium Instagram social media advert promoting Grade 10 Technical Mathematics Holiday Classes. The visual should immediately communicate academic excellence, confidence, and opportunity while appealing to learners and parents.

Visual Direction

  • Create a minimal yet premium composition with strong visual hierarchy.

  • Use a realistic classroom environment featuring face-brick walls.

  • The focus should be on African Grade 10 learners actively engaged in learning.

  • Include:

    • Brown-skinned African learners.

    • Female learners wearing neatly styled braids.

    • Natural, dry human skin texture—avoid any AI-generated plastic or waxy appearance.

    • Authentic facial expressions showing concentration, confidence, and enthusiasm.

  • Ensure lighting is soft, natural, and cinematic to create a professional educational atmosphere.

  • Keep the design uncluttered with generous white space and refined typography.

Copy

Headline

Join Grade 10 Technical Mathematics Holiday Classes with Mr Ntsimango

Class Schedule

  • 13 July, 14 July & 15 July

  • Time: 16:00 – 20:00

Venue
Amalinde Primary School

Contact
+27 83 345 0582

Call-to-Action

Avoid generic phrases such as "Register Today." Instead, use premium alternatives such as:

  • Enroll Today

  • Secure Your Spot

  • Limited Seats Available

  • Reserve Your Place

Design Style

  • Agency-level execution.

  • Premium and trustworthy.

  • Modern educational branding.

  • Minimal but visually impactful.

  • High-end typography with excellent spacing and alignment.

  • Strong contrast and readability for mobile viewing.

  • The final design should feel professionally photographed rather than AI-generated.

This advert will represent the beginning of our relationship with the client, so every detail—from composition and realism to typography and finishing—must reflect the highest creative standards.
